title: BTS’s “ARIRANG” Re-Enters Top 10 Of Billboard 200 3 Months After Its Release
content:
Three months after its release, BTS’s latest album has returned to the top 10 of the Billboard 200! On June 21 local time, Billboard announced that BTS’s studio album “ARIRANG” had re-entered the top 10 of its Top 200 Albums chart, which ranks the most popular albums in the United States. “ARIRANG” climbed back up… Continue reading BTS’s “ARIRANG” Re-Enters Top 10 Of Billboard 200 3 Months After Its Release
The post BTS’s “ARIRANG” Re-Enters Top 10 Of Billboard 200 3 Months After Its Release appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: BTS专辑《ARIRANG》发行三个月后重返Billboard 200前十
facts_list: 当地时间6月21日，Billboard宣布BTS录音室专辑《ARIRANG》重新进入Billboard 200专辑榜前十
该专辑于三个月前发行
summary_zh: BTS的录音室专辑《ARIRANG》在发行三个月后，于当地时间6月21日重新进入Billboard 200专辑榜前十。Billboard官方公布了这一消息，该榜单统计美国最受欢迎的专辑。

facts_list: 本周，Jennie与Tame Impala合作的《Dracula》混音版在Billboard多个榜单上攀升至新高
该曲在Billboard Pop Airplay榜上升至第6位
该曲在Billboard Songs of the Summer榜上也创下新高
summary_zh: BLACKPINK成员Jennie与Tame Impala合作的《Dracula》混音版在美国电台持续升温。本周，该曲在Billboard多个榜单上创下新高，包括Pop Airplay榜第6位及夏日歌曲榜的新峰值，为两位歌手带来新的职业生涯高点。

title: “Teach You A Lesson” And “My Royal Nemesis” Top Most Buzzworthy Drama And Actor Rankings
content:
“Teach You a Lesson” and “My Royal Nemesis” swept all of the top spots on this week’s rankings of the most buzzworthy dramas and actors! title_zh: 《Teach You a Lesson》与《My Royal Nemesis》登顶本周话题剧集及演员榜
facts_list: 本周，Netflix剧集《Teach You a Lesson》在Good Data Corporation的每周话题剧集榜单中升至第1位。

summary_zh: 本周，Netflix剧集《Teach You a Lesson》在Good Data Corporation的每周话题剧集榜单中升至第1位，同时《My Royal Nemesis》在演员话题榜中表现突出，占据多个上位圈位置。Good Data Corporation通过分析新闻文章、社交媒体、评论等数据确定每周榜单。

title: CORTIS, aespa, LE SSERAFIM, Stray Kids, MEOVV, BTS, ILLIT, TXT, And More Sweep Top Spots On Billboard World Albums Chart
content:

The group’s debut EP “COLOR OUTSIDE THE LINES” also… Continue reading CORTIS, aespa, LE SSERAFIM, Stray Kids, MEOVV, BTS, ILLIT, TXT, And More Sweep Top Spots On Billboard World Albums Chart
The post CORTIS, aespa, LE SSERAFIM, Stray Kids, MEOVV, BTS, ILLIT, TXT, And More Sweep Top Spots On Billboard World Albums Chart appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: CORTIS、aespa、LE SSERAFIM、Stray Kids等横扫公告牌世界专辑榜
facts_list: 公告牌发布截至6月20日一周的世界专辑榜
CORTIS最新EP《GREENGREEN》在发行第六周重回榜首，并连续第五周进入公告牌200强前50名
CORTIS出道EP《COLOR OUTSIDE THE LINES》也上榜
aespa、LE SSERAFIM、Stray Kids、MEOVV、BTS、ILLIT、TXT等艺人占据榜单高位
summary_zh: 公告牌发布截至6月20日一周的世界专辑榜，CORTIS的EP《GREENGREEN》在发行第六周重回榜首，并连续第五周进入公告牌200强前50名。此外，aespa、LE SSERAFIM、Stray Kids、MEOVV、BTS、ILLIT、TXT等艺人也在榜单上占据高位。
